title: AN ACT SEPARATING THE COMMONWEALTH NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL 芒聙聯 KAUSWAGAN ANNEX IN BARANGAY KAUSWAGAN, MUNICIPALITY OF AURORA, PROVINCE OF ZAMBOANGA DEL SUR FROM THE COMMONWEALTH NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, CONVERTING IT INTO AN INDEPENDENT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS KAUSWAGAN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
H. No. 5811; 109 OG No. 7, 822 (February 18, 2013)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 10293, November 14, 2012 ]

AN ACT SEPARATING THE COMMONWEALTH NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL 芒聙聯 KAUSWAGAN ANNEX IN BARANGAY KAUSWAGAN, MUNICIPALITY OF AURORA, PROVINCE OF ZAMBOANGA DEL SUR FROM THE COMMONWEALTH NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, CONVERTING IT INTO AN INDEPENDENT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS KAUSWAGAN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1.

Separation and Conversion into a National High School.

芒聙聯 The Commonwealth National High School 芒聙聯 Kauswagan Annex in Barangay Kauswagan, Municipality of Aurora, Province of Zamboanga del Sur is hereby separated from the Commonwealth National High School and convened into an independent national high school to be known as Kauswagan National High School.

SEC. 2.

Transfer of Assets and Liabilities. 芒聙聯

All personnel, assets, liabilities and records of the Commonwealth National High School 芒聙聯 Kauswagan Annex are hereby transferred to and absorbed by the Kauswagan National High School.

SEC. 3.

Appropriations.

芒聙聯 The Secretary of Education shall immediately include in the Department芒聙聶s program the operationalization of the Kauswagan National High School, the initial funding of which shall be charged against the current year芒聙聶s appropriations of the Commonwealth National High School 芒聙聯 Kauswagan Annex. Thereafter, the amount necessary for the continued operation of the school shall be included in the annual General Appropriations Act.

SEC. 4.

Implementation. 芒聙聯

The Secretary of Education shall issue such rules and regulations as may be necessary to carry out the purpose of this Act.

SEC. 5.

Effectivity.

芒聙聯 This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days after its publication in the

Official Gazette.

Approved,

(Sgd.)

JUAN PONCE ENRILE

President of the Senate

(Sgd.)

FELICIANO BELMONTE JR.

Speaker of the House

of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on March 5, 2012 and August 28, 2012, respectively.

(Sgd.)

EMMA LIRIO-REYES

Secretary of the Senate

(Sgd.)

MARILYN B. BARUA-YAP

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved:

NOV 14 2012

(Sgd.)

BENIGNO S. AQUINO III

President of the Philippines
